title: calamus depauperatus
intro: Calamus depauperatus, also known as lesser calamus or thin-leaved calamus, is a type of rhizome plant belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of calamus depauperatus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as digestive problems like bloating and indigestion. Calamus depauperatus is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or essential oils for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
